title: DevAI AIDD Plugin Runtime Configuration
description: Full effective configuration shape for the devai-aidd-plugin.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version identifier. Bumping this constant requires a corresponding migration step.

defaultType.description: Default branch type (e.g. feat, fix, chore).

fallbackTicket.description: Fallback ticket identifier when none is detected.

longLivedBranches.description: List of long-lived branch names (e.g. main, master).

validationRegex.description: Regex pattern for branch name validation.

commandTypeMap.description: Mapping of command names to branch type slugs.

category.description: Policy category. Known vocabulary: implementation, planning, research, docs, review. Unknown values are accepted (forward-compat) but raise a vocabulary audit warning.

identityStrategy.description: Identity resolution strategy. Known vocabulary: story, ticket-or-args, artifact-singleton, artifact-or-args. Unknown values are accepted (forward-compat) but raise a vocabulary audit warning.

branchRequired.description: Whether a branch is required for this workflow.

finalization.description: Finalization behavior. Known vocabulary: commit-and-push, commit-optional-push, no-forced-finalization. Unknown values are accepted (forward-compat) but raise a vocabulary audit warning.

artifactKey.description: Optional artifact key for singleton artifact strategies.

skipInitAndBaseline.description: When true (default), skip git init and baseline-commit readiness gating unless workflow policy requires repository-backed lifecycle behavior via branchRequired=true or finalization=commit-and-push|commit-optional-push.
